skos:definition.@value: to reach, come to, reach, come to, arrive at, get, gain, obtain, etc
erreichen, anlangen —, eintreffen bei; erreichen ihr Ende
gelangen zu; erreichen; einholen; nach allen Weltgegenden hin sich zerstreuen

@graph.rdf:value:
<L>19412<pc>112,2<k1>aS<k2>aS<h>1<e>1
<hom>1.</hom> <s>aS</s> ¦ (in <lang>classical Sanskṛt</lang> only) <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>aSnute</s>
(<ab>aor.</ab> 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>ASizata</s>, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>;
<ab>perf.</ab> <s>AnaSe</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. vii, 4, 72.</ls> Vedic forms are: <s>aSnoti</s>, &c.;
<ab>Subj.</ab> <s>aSnavat</s>, &c.;
<ab>aor.</ab> <ab>P.</ab> <s>Anaw</s> (2. & 3. <ab>sg.</ab>, frequently in <ls>RV.</ls>) and <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>azwa</s> or <s>A/zwa</s>, 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>ASata</s> (frequently in <ls>RV.</ls>) or <s>A/kzizur</s> [<ls>RV. i, 163, 10</ls>] <ab>Subj.</ab> <s>a/kzat</s> [<ls>RV. x, 11, 7</ls>] <ab>Pot.</ab> 1. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>aSema</s> <ab>Prec.</ab> <s>aSyAs</s> (2. & 3. <ab>sg.</ab>) &c. <ab>Pot.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> 1. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>aSIya</s> and <ab>pl.</ab> <s>aSImahi</s>, <ab>Imper.</ab> <s>azwu</s> [<ls>VS.</ls>];
<ab>perf.</ab> <s>AnaMSa</s> (thrice in <ls>RV.</ls>) or <s>AnASa</s> [<ls>RV. vi, 16, 26</ls>] or <s>ASa</s> [<ls>RV. viii, 47, 6</ls>], 2. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>AnaSa/</s>, 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>AnaSu/H</s> (frequently in <ls>RV.</ls>) or <s>ASuH</s> [<ls>RV. iv, 33, 4</ls>], <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>AnaSe/</s>, <ab>Subj.</ab> 1. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>anaSAmahE</s> [<ls>RV. viii, 27, 22</ls>], <ab>Pot.</ab> 1. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>AnasyAm</s>, <ab>p.</ab> <s>AnaSAna/</s> [<ls>AV.</ls>]; <ab>Inf.</ab> <s>azwave</s>, <ls>RV. iv, 30, 19</ls>)
<div n="to"/>to reach, come to, reach, come to, arrive at, get, gain, obtain, <ls>RV.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/> (said of an evil, <s>aMhati</s>, <s>a/Mhas</s>, <s>grA/hi</s>) to visit, <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>AV. vi, 113, 1</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to master, become master of <ls>RV.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to offer, <ls>RV.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to enjoy, <ls>MBh. xii, 12136</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to pervade, penetrate, fill, <ls>Naigh.</ls>; <ls>Bhaṭṭ. ii, 30</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to accumulate, <ls>L.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>aSiSizate</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. vii, 2, 74</ls> <ab>Intens.</ab> <s>aSASyate</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. iii, 1, 22</ls>; <ls>Pat.</ls><info whitneyroots="aS1,4"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="0Ā,0P"/>
<LEND>
